title: Catalog builder cannot attach detached figure caption text blocks
evidence: In kleinberg_algorithm_design, many figures are emitted as image blocks with empty image_caption while the actual caption appears as a neighboring text block (e.g. idx 2583 image + idx 2589 'Figure 5.8 ...', idx 3713 inline figure reference text, parser/smoke leaves empty_captions=269 and unresolved Figure refs=1 even after enabling figure_caption_merge).
proposal: Extend parser/catalog extraction to optionally bind adjacent text blocks that match figure/table caption patterns to neighboring image/chart/table/code blocks, instead of relying only on image_caption/table_caption arrays and the current subfigure merge heuristic.
